name: TLC59208F
description: The TLC59208F component represents a Texas Instruments TLC59208F 8-bit PWM driver ([datasheet](http://www.ti.com/lit/gpn/tlc59208f), [hw example](https://faboplatform.github.io/ArduinoDocs/03.I2C%20Brick/211_brick_i2c_7seg/)) in ESPHome. It uses [I²C Bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) for communication.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The I²C address of the driver.
